title: LockSettingsService startRemoteLockscreenValidation/validateRemoteLockscreen no permission check at binder layer
pattern: Missing permission check (needs verification of deeper layer)
notes: startRemoteLockscreenValidation() and validateRemoteLockscreen() at lines 2857-2869 have NO permission check before delegating to RecoverableKeyStoreManager. AIDL has no @EnforcePermission. Security likely in RecoverableKeyStoreManager (typically requires RECOVER_KEYSTORE). If that class has no check, this is HIGH — any app could initiate remote lock screen credential validation. Needs source verification of RecoverableKeyStoreManager.
